title: AgentGraphState
description: The LangGraph state object threaded through every node. Decided up front so Summarizer, Auditor, and the conditional edge all agree on shape before any node is implemented.

original_text.description: Immutable. Never overwritten by any node.

draft_summary.description: Written by Summarizer node on cache misses, or by cache_check on cache hits. Overwritten on each retry.

cache_hit.description: Written by cache_check. true means draft_summary came from the semantic cache and still must pass Auditor and fact_checker validation; false means the graph should draft a new summary.

audit_verdict.description: Structured (schema-validated) output from the Auditor node -- NEVER a freeform string. This is the prompt-injection defense: the routing decision reads verdict.status, not raw model text.

fact_check_result.description: Deterministic regex-based verification result. Runs after an Auditor VALID verdict and checks that every extracted date-like and dollar-amount fact from the original text appears literally in the draft summary.

missing_facts.description: Literal date-like and dollar-amount substrings extracted from original_text but missing from draft_summary.

iteration_count.description: Incremented each time the conditional edge routes back to Summarizer. At 3, graph routes to HITL escrow instead of retrying again.
